name: Delayed realization my Phoenix AI legal research was fake—what's statute?
description: From discovery of fake research; 2 yrs AZ.[2]

mainEntity.name: Delayed realization my Phoenix AI legal research was fake—what's statute?

acceptedAnswer.text: From discovery of fake research; 2 yrs AZ.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Discovery rule starts clock when you reasonably learn of harm, e.g., opposing motion; AZ 2 years typical for malpractice.[2] Factors: diligence in checking. Document discovery date. File soon to avoid bars.
